song.title: Protector of My Soul
song.lyrics:
[V1] . C F G O Protector of my soul. . C F G You will stand against the foe. . Am G/B C D In the dark You'll be a light for me, . F G C O Protector of my soul.
[C] .G C F C You who created the ends of the earth, .G F C Guided me unto Your throne, .G C F C Offered Your healing hand to me, .G F C/G G Mercifully made me Your own.
.(optional guitar solo: Am G/B C D F G C C)
[B] . C F G O Holy Spirit, come! . C F G Show the world where life comes from. . Am G/B C D May they always see You alive in me. . F G C O Holy Spirit, come!
